status_definitions.observed: directly supported by a cited repository source
status_definitions.inferred: derived from observed records with rationale

records.claim: The project uses five teams sharing one durable state.
The Cloudflare source exists while public deployment remains unproven.
The independent creative site must remain distinct from Mirror Cartographer.
A normalized provenance index is the first dependency for continuity mining.
records.rationale: M-001 requires an index schema, source boundaries, and first records.

records.claim: A canonical language lexicon and decision supersession graph have not yet been located.

rules: Do not upgrade inferred claims to observed without a cited source.
Retain superseded records and link their replacements.
Index summaries and source locators rather than raw source text.
